cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out which present Eve ends up with after all these swaps. I need to track each swap step by step. Let me start by listing the initial presents each person has. Initially: - Alice: green present - Bob: white present - Claire: black ball - Dave: orange ball - Eve: yellow present Now, the swaps happen in a specific order. Let me go through each swap one by one. First swap: Bob and Alice swap their gifts. After this swap: - Alice now has Bob's white present. - Bob now has Alice's original green present. So, Alice: white; Bob: green; Claire: black; Dave: orange; Eve: yellow. Second swap: Alice and Eve swap their gifts. After this swap: - Alice gives her white present to Eve, and takes Eve's yellow present. - Eve now has the white present that Alice had, and Alice has the yellow. So, Alice: yellow; Bob: green; Claire: black; Dave: orange; Eve: white. Third swap: Claire and Eve swap their gifts. Eve currently has white, Claire has black. After swapping: - Claire gets Eve's white present. - Eve gets Claire's black ball. Now, Alice: yellow; Bob: green; Claire: white; Dave: orange; Eve: black. Fourth swap: Alice and Dave swap their gifts. Alice has yellow, Dave has orange. After swapping: - Alice gets orange, Dave gets yellow. So, Alice: orange; Bob: green; Claire: white; Dave: yellow; Eve: black. Fifth swap: Bob and Eve swap their gifts. Bob has green, Eve has black. After swapping: -
